info.title: SyncNuGets
info.description: Will push every missing nuget version from a nuget source to a nuget destination

options.name: --package-name
options.description: Name of the package to sync. When not provided this tool will attempt to synchronize every package from the source location. [default: *]

options.name: --package-source
options.description: Source url of the package store.

options.name: --package-target
options.description: Target url of the package store to push into.

options.name: --package-source-token
options.description: Token to access the source package store.

options.name: --package-target-token
options.description: Token to allow pushing into the target package store.

options.name: --include-prerelease
options.description: When true, pre-releases will also be synced. [default: False]
